title: Mubert Playlist
description: Playlist node in Mubert's mood/genre/activity taxonomy. Each playlist exposes an index used to drive generation and streaming, plus the BPM/key envelopes it supports.

playlist_index.description: Dotted index addressing the playlist in the Mubert taxonomy tree (e.g. '1.0.0').

group.description: Sub-grouping inside the category (e.g. Workout, Lo-fi, Chill).

channel.description: Leaf channel name presented to end users.

params.description: Allowed BPM ranges and the keys playable in each range.
